net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface Door

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    DoorImpl

    public interface Door
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Door'.

    The following features are supported:

    • XPosition
    • On Both Sides
    • Width
    • Id
    • Number Of Simultaneous Passengers
    • Is Active
    • Waiting Passengers
    • Door Option
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getDoor()

    • Method Detail

      • getXPosition

        int getXPosition()
        Returns the value of the 'XPosition' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'XPosition' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'XPosition' attribute.
        See Also:
        setXPosition(int), CabinPackage.getDoor_XPosition()

      • setXPosition

        void setXPosition(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'XPosition' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'XPosition' attribute.
        See Also:
        getXPosition()

      • isOnBothSides

        boolean isOnBothSides()
        Returns the value of the 'On Both Sides' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'On Both Sides' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'On Both Sides' attribute.
        See Also:
        setOnBothSides(boolean), CabinPackage.getDoor_OnBothSides()

      • setOnBothSides

        void setOnBothSides(boolean value)
        Sets the value of the 'On Both Sides' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'On Both Sides' attribute.
        See Also:
        isOnBothSides()

        int getWidth()
        Returns the value of the 'Width' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Width' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Sets the value of the 'Width' attribute.

        int getId()
        Returns the value of the 'Id' attribute.

      • getNumberOfSimultaneousPassengers

        int getNumberOfSimultaneousPassengers()
        Returns the value of the 'Number Of Simultaneous Passengers' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Number Of Simultaneous Passengers' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Number Of Simultaneous Passengers' attribute.
        See Also:
        setNumberOfSimultaneousPassengers(int), CabinPackage.getDoor_NumberOfSimultaneousPassengers()

        void setNumberOfSimultaneousPassengers(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Number Of Simultaneous Passengers' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Number Of Simultaneous Passengers' attribute.
        See Also:
        getNumberOfSimultaneousPassengers()

      • isIsActive

        boolean isIsActive()
        Returns the value of the 'Is Active' attribute. The default value is "true".

        If the meaning of the 'Is Active' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Is Active' attribute.
        See Also:
        setIsActive(boolean), CabinPackage.getDoor_IsActive()

      • setIsActive

        void setIsActive(boolean value)
        Sets the value of the 'Is Active' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Is Active' attribute.
        See Also:
        isIsActive()

      • getWaitingPassengers

        org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<Passenger> getWaitingPassengers()
        Returns the value of the 'Waiting Passengers' reference list. The list contents are of type Passenger.

        If the meaning of the 'Waiting Passengers' reference list isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Waiting Passengers' reference list.
        See Also:
        CabinPackage.getDoor_WaitingPassengers()

      • getDoorOption

        DoorOption getDoorOption()
        Returns the value of the 'Door Option' attribute. The default value is "StandardDoor". The literals are from the enumeration DoorOption.

        If the meaning of the 'Door Option' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Door Option' attribute.
        See Also:
        DoorOption, setDoorOption(DoorOption), CabinPackage.getDoor_DoorOption()

      • setDoorOption

        void setDoorOption(DoorOption value)
        Sets the value of the 'Door Option' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Door Option' attribute.
        See Also:
        DoorOption, getDoorOption()
